task_completion.description: Upload the logo for PDF print-outs
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Invoice and Packing Slip Design configuration settings, the file 'nestwell_logo.png' is visible in the file upload field for 'Logo for PDF Print-outs'.

task_completion.description: Upload the logo for HTML print-outs
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Invoice and Packing Slip Design configuration settings, the file 'nestwell_logo.png' is visible in the file upload field for 'Logo for HTML Print View'.

task_completion.description: Set the company address for invoices
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Address' text area in the configuration settings contains exactly: 'NestWell Home Fulfillment, 123 Commerce Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90001' (can be on multiple lines).
A success message is visible indicating the configuration has been saved (e.g., 'You saved the configuration.').

task_completion.description: Access the most recent pending order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is viewing the details of an order that has a 'Pending' status in the store's order management interface.

task_completion.description: Generate an invoice for the pending order
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the invoice has been created (e.g., 'The invoice has been created.') OR the agent is viewing the newly generated invoice record for the order.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to configure settings and generate the invoice
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the e-commerce admin panel, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Invoice was generated through the actual order management system
integrity.visual_evidence: The invoice creation process occurs within the 'Sales -> Orders' section of the e-commerce platform, not by manually editing a PDF or HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the configuration in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The address and logo uploads are entered into the actual configuration form fields of the application, not typed into a text editor like gedit or nano.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected logo filename is 'nestwell_logo.png' (a 1x1 pixel PNG). The expected address to be configured is exactly: 'NestWell Home Fulfillment\n123 Commerce Dr\nLos Angeles, CA 90001'. The task involves configuring Magento branding and generating an invoice.
